patch

(In reply to mikael.urankar from comment #7)
> can you test the attached patch on aarch64 and revert ...?

  ../../../../qtwebengine-everywhere-src-5.12.1/src/3rdparty/chromium/third_party/zlib/arm_features.c:16:10: fatal error: 'asm/hwcap.h' file not found
